inactive.label: Inactive users
inactive.description: Users whose last login or registration date exceeds the configured threshold.
inactive.empty: No inactive users match the current policy.
inactive.drawerDescription: Review this inactive user before changing the policy.

audit.label: Audit log
audit.description: Disable and deletion decisions recorded by the inactive-user scanner.
audit.drawerDescription: Review the complete inactive-user action record.

policy.label: Policy
policy.description: Control when dormant accounts are reported, disabled, or deleted.

exclusions.label: Exclusions
exclusions.description: Protect roles and individual users from inactive-user actions.
